title: Remote Cloner
profTagline: Capture and replay your own fixed-code remotes with a HackRF
installDesc: Add to your home screen for full-screen use.
installIosHint: Tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: Open the browser menu and choose Install.
connectBody: Plug the HackRF into this phone with a USB-C OTG cable, then grant access. Capture and replay your own remotes on-device. A rolling-code remote (car keys, modern garages) changes every press, so a replay usually will not open anything.
noUsb: This browser has no WebUSB. Open in Chrome on Android or desktop.
recording: Recording — press your remote, then tap to stop
rollingWarn: Looks like rolling-code — a replay usually will not work
savedEmpty: No saved signals yet — record a remote
ownNote: Transmit only to devices you own, and keep the power low. Fixed-code remotes only — rolling-code security is out of scope.
